query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as "count!"
        FROM tasks t
        JOIN task_assignees ta ON ta.task_id = t.id
        WHERE ta.user_id = $1
          AND t.due_date >= $2
          AND t.due_date <= $3
          AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
          AND NOT EXISTS (
              SELECT 1 FROM project_statuses ps
              WHERE ps.id = t.status_id
              AND ps.type = 'done'
          )
